name: Premium Packaging Shot
description: Товар вместе с премиум упаковкой. Всё идеально выровнено. Роскошная коммерческая фотография.
prompt_prefix: Luxury commercial product photography. Product displayed together with its premium packaging. Product and box perfectly aligned. Clean composition. High-end unboxing aesthetic. Ultra realistic. 8K. Premium retail display quality. Gift-worthy presentation.
composition: Product next to or emerging from open premium box, 45° angle, symmetrical
lighting: Soft studio lighting, highlights catching packaging texture
